channel.title: Vista Theater Hollywood
channel.description: Now playing at Vista Theater Hollywood — 35mm and 70mm presentations.

item.title: Angel Heart
item.description:
In 1955 New Orleans, small-time private investigator Harry Angel is hired by a man who calls himself Louis Cypher to track down a singer named Johnny Favorite, but the investigation takes an unexpected and somber turn. "When Carolco was King” presented in partnership with Rialto Pictures and STUDIOCANAL.
Cast: Director: Alan Parker | Writers: William Hjortsberg, Alan Parker | Stars: Mickey Rourke, Robert De Niro, Lisa Bonet
Data: 1987
Durata: 113 minuti

Orari: June 9th Tuesday ore 7:00 pm

item.title: Jacob's Ladder
item.description:
Reminiscing about his dead son, a Vietnam War veteran attempts to uncover his past while suffering from a severe case of dissociation. To do so, he must decipher reality and life from his own dreams, delusions, and perceptions of death. "When Carolco was King” presented in partnership with Rialto Pictures and STUDIOCANAL.
Cast: Director: Adrian Lyne | Writers: Bruce Joel Rubin | Stars: Tim Robbins, Elizabeth Peña, Danny Aiello
Data: 1990
Durata: 113 minuti

Orari: June 9th Tuesday ore 7:00 pm

item.title: Mountains of the Moon
item.description:
The legendary true-story of Capt. Richard Francis Burton and Lt. John Hanning Speke's tumultuous expedition to find the source of the Nile river. "When Carolco was King” presented in partnership with Rialto Pictures and STUDIOCANAL.
Cast: Director: Bob Rafelson | Writers: William Harrison, Bob Rafelson | Stars: Patrick Bergin, Iain Glen, Richard E. Grant
Data: 1990
Durata: 136 minuti

Orari: June 10th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: Disclosure Day
item.description:
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This June, the truth belongs to seven billion people. We are coming close to … Disclosure Day.
Cast: Director: Steven Spielberg | Writers: David Koepp, Steven Spielberg | Stars: Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Eve Hewson
Data: 2026
Durata: 145 minuti

Orari: June 11th Thursday ore 2:00 pm, June 11th Thursday ore 6:30 pm (Sold Out), June 12th Friday ore 10:00 am, June 12th Friday ore 2:00 pm, June 12th Friday ore 6:00 pm, June 12th Friday ore 10:15 pm, June 13th Saturday ore 10:00 am, June 13th Saturday ore 2:00 pm, June 13th Saturday ore 6:00 pm, June 13th Saturday ore 10:15 pm, June 14th Sunday ore 10:00 am, June 14th Sunday ore 2:00 pm, June 14th Sunday ore 6:30 pm, June 15th Monday ore 11:00 am, June 15th Monday ore 3:00 pm, June 15th Monday ore 7:30 pm, June 16th Tuesday ore 11:00 am, June 16th Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, June 16th Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, June 17th Wednesday ore 11:00 am, June 17th Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, June 17th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, June 18th Thursday ore 11:00 am, June 18th Thursday ore 3:00 pm, June 18th Thursday ore 7:30 pm, June 19th Friday ore 10:00 am, June 19th Friday ore 2:00 pm, June 19th Friday ore 6:00 pm, June 19th Friday ore 10:15 pm, June 20th Saturday ore 10:00 am, June 20th Saturday ore 2:00 pm, June 20th Saturday ore 6:00 pm, June 20th Saturday ore 10:15 pm, June 21st Sunday ore 10:00 am, June 21st Sunday ore 2:00 pm, June 21st Sunday ore 6:30 pm, June 22nd Monday ore 11:00 am, June 22nd Monday ore 3:00 pm, June 22nd Monday ore 7:30 pm, June 23rd Tuesday ore 11:00 am, June 23rd Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, June 23rd Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, June 24th Wednesday ore 11:00 am, June 24th Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, June 24th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, June 25th Thursday ore 11:00 am, June 25th Thursday ore 3:00 pm, June 25th Thursday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: The Wild Party
item.description:
A comely collegian (Clara Bow) falls for an anthropology professor (Fredric March) and accompanies him on a jungle expedition.
Cast: Director: Dorothy Arzner | Writers: Samuel Hopkins Adams, E. Lloyd Sheldon | Stars: Clara Bow, Fredric March
Data: 1929
Durata: 76 minuti

Orari: June 28th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: Jaws
item.description:
When a gigantic great white shark begins to menace the small island community of Amity, a police chief, a marine scientist and grizzled fisherman set out to stop it.
Cast: Director: Steven Spielberg | Writers: Peter Benchley, Carl Gottlieb | Stars: Roy Scheider, Robert Shaw, Richard Dreyfuss
Data: 1975
Durata: 124 minuti

Orari: July 3rd Friday ore 11:30 pm, July 4th Saturday ore 10:00 am, July 4th Saturday ore 11:30 pm, July 5th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: The Odyssey
item.description:
After the Trojan War, Odysseus faces a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way.
Cast: Director: Christopher Nolan | Writers: Christopher Nolan | Stars: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong'o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Data: 2026
Durata: 172 minuti

Orari: July 16th Thursday ore 2:00 pm, July 16th Thursday ore 7:30 pm (Sold Out), July 17th Friday ore 10:00 am, July 17th Friday ore 2:00 pm, July 17th Friday ore 6:20 pm, July 17th Friday ore 10:30 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 10:00 am, July 18th Saturday ore 2:00 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 6:20 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 10:30 pm, July 19th Sunday ore 10:00 am, July 19th Sunday ore 2:30 pm, July 19th Sunday ore 7:00 pm, July 20th Monday ore 11:00 am, July 20th Monday ore 3:00 pm, July 20th Monday ore 7:30 pm, July 21st Tuesday ore 11:00 am, July 21st Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, July 21st Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, July 22nd Wednesday ore 11:00 am, July 22nd Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, July 22nd Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, July 23rd Thursday ore 11:00 am, July 23rd Thursday ore 3:00 pm, July 23rd Thursday ore 7:30 pm
